examples: Sushi may not be traditional Christmas fare, but this Beluga seems keen.
Beluga usually ranges from purple to black, the palest being the most expensive.
The inlet hosts beluga whales, which could soon be added to the endangered species list.
Returning to shore, I saw a pod of beluga whales travelling across the fjord.
If it comes to pass, it would forbid all imports of beluga sturgeon products.
